awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 7 wins & 15 nominations total
writer: Gary Scott Thompson, Andrew W. Marlowe
actors: Kevin Bacon, Elisabeth Shue, Josh Brolin
plot: Having discovered they could turn animals invisible, a group of scientists test the subject on a human. Head of research, Dr. Sebastian Caine decides to use himself as the subject. After the experiment can't be reversed, it takes a toll on Caine's personality, causing him to hunt down and kill his colleagues
